title.en: So far, not a single Six-Winged Family's extrad...

content.en:
"Sure enough, there is a conspiracy!"

Ye Tian understood that the Six-Winged Family really didn't have a good heart, and let them, the transcendent realms of the first realm, come over to help, and secondly, as a blood sacrifice, a blood sacrifice for a certain item.

Similarly, once the extradimensional realm of the Nine-Star Pluto Snake Clan falls, it will also be absorbed by that item.

Of course, if the Six-Winged Family and several other extra-dimensional forces of the extra-dimensional realm fell, they would also be absorbed by that item, but the Six-Winged Family gave the extra-dimensional realm within the clan a life-saving thing.

So far, not a single Six-Winged Family's extradimensional realm has fallen.

And the extra-dimensional realm does not have such hole cards.

"Xuanyi Realm Lord, what's the situation?"

An extradimensional realm questioned the Xuanyi Realm Lord during a battle.

The Xuanyi Realm Lord was also deliberately surprised: "Our Six-Winged Family doesn't know what the situation is, it seems that the Nine-Star Hades Snake Clan has any special formations that can absorb the corpses of the Extradimensional Realm, everyone be careful, as long as they are not killed, it will not be affected." "

Many extradimensional realms were annoyed, but what the Xuanyi Realm Lord said was right, as long as it didn't fall, it wouldn't have any impact, and if it fell, then they wouldn't be able to see this scene.

But the Six-Winged Family deliberately concealed this kind of thing, and they were really angry.

Moreover, the Six-Winged Family didn't admit it, and they couldn't help it.

If the Six-Winged Family had given it all out at the beginning, then who else would have participated in this operation!

Of course.

The Six-Winged Family did not dare to break the contract afterwards, after all, among these extra-dimensional realms, there were also extra-dimensional realms from some powerful forces, and these forces did not cooperate with the Six-Winged Family, but only participated in the action with a separate extradimensional realm, which was a personal act.

The Six-Winged Family didn't dare to deliberately harm this group of extra-dimensional realms, but its own strength was not good enough to fall, so it was no wonder that the Six-Winged Family was gone.

Ye Tian didn't care about the conspiracy of the Six-Winged Family, his purpose was still the benefits that the Six-Winged Family had promised to give.

As long as he gives benefits, he doesn't care what kind of conspiracy he has.

The battle continues.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to show a little strength, bombarding and killing a nine-star pluto snake that had been cultivated in the early stage of the first realm, and then killed another nine-star pluto snake.

The strength of many extra-dimensional realms is not strong, and they can't kill the nine-star pluto snakes of the super-dimensional realm at all, and Ye Tian still has the hope of killing ten super-dimensional realm level nine-star pluto snakes.

If you kill ten first-realm nine-star snakes, the six-winged family will directly give a mysterious fragment.

After another while, Ye Tian killed the second nine-star pluto snake, but at this time, he was targeted, and the three-headed nine-star pluto snake of the first realm besieged Ye Tian.

Obviously, Ye Tian killed the two Nine-Star Snake of the First Realm in a row, which really angered the Nine-Star Snake Clan.

With the passage of time, more and more Nine-Star Snake and Extradimensional Realm fell, but the battle was not over, and the battle in the Second Realm was still continuing.

"Six to three, as a result, until now, the six second-level super-dimensional realms of the six-winged family, the Jialan Chamber of Commerce, the Refining Treasure Building and other forces have made up their minds to pay attention to these super-dimensional realms, and it is estimated that there are not many extra-dimensional realms that can survive in the end. Ye Tian said darkly.

Another time passed.

Ye Tian's body was also consumed a lot, and he was a little tired, but he had already killed the seven-headed Nine-Star Immortal Snake of the First Realm.

Moreover, from beginning to end, he did not show extra-dimensional rules and super-dimensional supernatural powers, but about eighty percent of ordinary battles were exposed.

"Burst out all your ordinary combat power, and then kill the three-headed nine-star snake, otherwise, the battle will be over soon!"

He could see that there were not many of the remaining First Realm Nine-Star Snake Snakes, and the Six-Winged Family's side already had an advantage at the First Realm Transcendent Realm level.

However, seventy percent of the extra-dimensional realms that participated in this operation have already fallen, and it is conceivable how many extra-dimensional realms of the first realm have fallen, and those who can survive are all the peaks of the first realm or the extra-dimensional realms with life-saving means.

Of course, even if the Six-Winged Family has any more hole cards, it has also fallen to several extradimensional realms, which is a loss that is difficult to avoid.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian burst out all of his ordinary combat power, except for the extra-dimensional rules and super-dimensional supernatural powers, other means were not hidden.

A Nine-Star Snake of the First Realm, which had already been heavily damaged, was instantly pierced by Ye Tian's Heaven Killing Battle Spear, and the extradimensional power of the Consummation Realm shattered everything in its body and bombarded it.

Then, he went all out and slew the ninth nine-star snake.

And when the battle was about to end, he killed another nine-star snake.

At this point, he had completed the killing task of the ten First Realm Nine Star Snakes.

After that, he didn't kill more of the Nine Star Snake, but while fighting, he conserved his strength, and secretly recovered his strength and weak injuries.

After another period of time, the last Nine-Star Pluto Snake of the First Realm was killed.

Then, they began to slaughter those half-step Nine-Star Immortal Snakes in the Extradimensional Realm, and it didn't take long for them to kill all the Nine-Star Snakes.

And at this time, the battle of the second realm ended.

Rumble!!!!

The corpse of the three-headed second-realm cultivator of the nine-star pluto snake fell down, and was seen by many extra-dimensional realms, and they were a little annoyed in their hearts.

They are not stupid, which shows that the Six-Winged Family has long been able to kill these three Nine-Star Snake of the Second Realm, and they have deliberately delayed until now.

Of course, they were still alive, so naturally they didn't question the Six-Winged Family, and those fallen extradimensional realms didn't have a chance to question.

Immediately afterward, the powerhouses of the Second Realm of the Six-Winged Family went deep into the depths of the Nine-Star Stygian Snake Ancestral Land and took out a treasure from within.

But what this treasure was, Ye Tian and they didn't know.

But Ye Tian could also guess that that treasure was enough to make the second realm excited, otherwise he would not join forces to destroy the Nine Star Dark Snake Clan.

With the destruction of the Nine-Star Snake Clan, this treasure land fell into the hands of the Six-Winged Family.

As for Ye Tian, they returned to the Six-Winged Family with the extra-dimensional realm of the Six-Winged Family.

......

Six-winged Sacred Mountain.

After coming back, the Golden Winged Realm Lord did not come forward, and the Xuanyi Realm Lord appeared as a representative of the Six-Winged Family, and then began to give rewards.

The results of each extradimensional realm can be clearly calculated, so the rewards are very fair.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, this is a mysterious fragment for you that can give birth to extradimensional rules, as well as six superdimensional Chiyuan Pills!"

When the Xuanyi Realm Lord took out these good things, his heart was trembling, and he was really reluctant!

But there is no way, if you don't give it, the news will be passed on, and the reputation of the Six-winged Family will stink!

So, this benefit has to be given. []

Moreover, this time the harvest of the Six-winged Family is too great, not to mention the mysterious treasure, even if the treasure of the Nine-Star Dark Snake Clan is enough to recover the cost.

Therefore, the benefits must be given, and it is also the mouth of these extradimensional realms that are blocked.
